description_long: This is a heavily armored, eight-wheeled combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a rotating turret mounted with a long-barreled cannon. The exterior is covered in a dark, multi-tone camouflage pattern, and the vehicle features prominent military markings, including white star emblems and stenciled numbers. The sides are equipped with storage compartments and gear, while the roof displays various hatches, periscopes, and a visible antenna. The front is reinforced with sloped armor and multiple vision ports, and the rear has additional armor plating and access hatches. The tires are large, rugged, and designed for off-road mobility, with a visible all-terrain tread pattern.
description: A camouflaged, eight-wheeled armored combat vehicle with a turret-mounted cannon, military markings, and rugged all-terrain tires.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored nose, vision ports, and the cannon barrel extending from the turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the eight large tires, side storage compartments, and the full length of the cannon.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor plating, rear hatches, and visible star markings on the roof.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the turret, cannon, side gear, and the vehicle's rugged tire arrangement.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret, with possible secondary mounts on the turret roof and hull front.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating; reinforced at the front and turret, with visible modular panels on the sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular patches of brown, black, and green.
attribute_military_markings: White star emblems on the roof and sides, and stenciled numbers on the turret and hull.
attribute_tire_type: Eight large, all-terrain tires with deep, rugged tread pattern for off-road capability.
